Eureka — A bright and engaging coffee blend, perfect for discovering new daily favorites.
MiiR New Standard Carafe — A stylish and functional carafe designed for serving and enjoying your brewed coffee.

Aeropress Coffee Maker — A versatile and portable coffee maker capable of brewing various coffee styles.
Breville Bambino Plus — A compact home espresso machine offering quick heat-up and automatic milk frothing.

Breville Barista Express — A popular all-in-one espresso machine with an integrated grinder and manual control options.
Breville Barista Touch — A user-friendly espresso machine featuring a touchscreen for personalized coffee recipes.

Circle Logo Tee — A simple short-sleeve t-shirt featuring the iconic Madcap Coffee circle logo.
Bolt Circle Tee — A short-sleeve t-shirt with a design inspired by the Bolt coffee blend.
Madcap Socks — Branded socks to show your love for Madcap Coffee from head to toe.
Always-On Crew — A cozy crewneck sweatshirt designed for comfort and everyday wear.

secondary: STAY CONNECTED — FOR THOUGHTFUL UPDATES, NEW RELEASES, AND A CLOSER LOOK AT WHAT WE'RE BUILDING.

matches.primary: Madcap Coffee exists to reveal the craftsmanship and human connection behind every cup, transforming a daily ritual into something more intentional. Based in Michigan, we roast and serve specialty coffee in Grand Rapids and Detroit while partnering with cafes, restaurants, and markets through our wholesale program.
